since_last: 65% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.24% · Gold +0.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 65% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.54%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.54%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +4.93%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +4.93%, DLR +3.38%, INTC +2.76%, PUBM +2.44%, HPE +2.10%. Laggards: SYNA -2.80%, SKHY -2.67%, NVT -2.27%, MU -2.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.86% at $117.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
